flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Idaho fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Idaho rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (38.3% → 43.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Idaho rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (6.9k → 7.7k).
